sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
OK, so now:
- Top: hollow purple ring (same)
- White diamond at (28, 36) with 6 pixels - appeared!
- Purple square at (30, 34) with magenta center at (32, 35)
So the purple square stayed at (30, 34) but a white diamond appeared at (28, 36) above it. The white diamond below disappeared.
This is interesting - it seems like the purple square moved up slightly (from the bottom position) and left a white diamond behind.
Wait, but I clicked on the magenta center at (32, 35) which is part of the purple square. The purple square is still at (30, 34) with magenta at (32, 35). So the purple square didn't move, but a white diamond appeared above it.
Actually, looking more carefully at the positions:
- Before: purple square at (30, 34), white diamond at (34, 33) with 9 pixels
- After: purple square at (30, 34), white diamond at (28, 36) with 6 pixels
So the white diamond moved from below to above the purple square, and shrank from 9 to 6 pixels.
This is getting confusing. Let me try to understand the pattern better.
Actually, wait. Let me look at the image again. The image shows:
- Top: hollow purple ring
- Middle: purple square with white pixel above it
- Bottom: dark gray pixel
So the white diamond is now above the purple square, not below. And there's a dark gray pixel below.
Let me try clicking on the purple square again to see what happens. The magenta center is at (32, 35).

Plan: Click on magenta center at (32, 35) again to see what happens.
